title: cinnamomum kiamis
intro: Cinnamomum kiamis, also known as the West Java sassafras or Indonesian sassafras, is a plant species native to Indonesia. It is a type of evergreen tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum kiamis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in the region. Herbal preparations of Cinnamomum kiamis often involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
